---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, enhancement, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly and concisely.
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

- New skill? Yes / No
- Changes existing skill behavior? Yes / No
- Changes tooling or CI? Yes / No

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples that help illustrate the request.
